parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number your are on.

parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: IdOffer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by offer Id.

parameters.name: ReferenceOffer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by offer reference.

parameters.name: StateLife
parameters.description: Filter ressources by offer status.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Filter ressources by name.

parameters.name: IsVisible
parameters.description: If true return visible ressources, if not those which are not.

parameters.name: AmountUpfront
parameters.description: Filter ressources with upfront amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountUpfrontMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with upfront amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountUpfrontMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with upfront amount lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTrial
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a trial amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTrialMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a trial amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTrialMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a trial amount lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: DurationTrial
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a trial duration equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: DurationTrialMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a trial duration greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: DurationTrialMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a trial duration lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: UnitTrial
parameters.description: Filter ressources by trial unit.

parameters.name: AmountRecurrence
parameters.description: Filter ressources with reccurent amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountRecurrenceMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with reccurent amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountRecurrenceMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with reccurent amount lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: DurationRecurrence
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a reccurence duration equal to selected value.

parameters.name: DurationRecurrenceMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a reccurence duration greater then selected value.

parameters.name: DurationRecurrenceMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a reccurence duration lower then selected value.

parameters.name: UnitRecurrence
parameters.description: Filter ressources by reccurence unit.

parameters.name: CountRecurrences
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a number of reccurence equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: CountRecurrencesMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a number of reccurence greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: CountRecurrencesMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a number of reccurence lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTermination
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a termintation amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTerminationMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a termination amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTerminationMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with a termination amount lower then the selected value.

schema.description:
Allow to get detailed offer subresources.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: OfferExtra

parameters.name: IdBusiness
parameters.description: Filter ressources by business Id.

parameters.name: IdSegment
parameters.description: Filter ressources by segment Id.

parameters.name: ReferenceSegment
parameters.description: Filter by segment Reference

parameters.name: IdUserCreation
parameters.description: Filter by the id of the user who created the ressource.

parameters.name: DateCreationMin
parameters.description: Filter resources created from the selected date.

parameters.name: DateCreationMax
parameters.description: Filter resources created until the selected date.

parameters.name: IdUserUpdate
parameters.description: Filter by user id who made the last modification

parameters.name: DateUpdateMin
parameters.description: Filter resources updated after the selected date.

parameters.name: DateUpdateMax
parameters.description: Filter resources updated before the selected date.
